name: Applied Physics II
description: Advanced physics topics for engineering such as electromagnetism and semiconductors.

name: Applied Mathematics II
description: Partial differential equations, Fourier transforms and complex analysis basics.

name: Electrical Science
description: Circuit theory, AC fundamentals and basic electronics.

name: Engineering Graphics
description: Technical drawing, projections and CAD basics.

name: Manufacturing Processes
description: Overview of manufacturing techniques and material processing.

name: Communication Skills
description: Written and oral communication techniques for engineers.

name: Indian Constitution
description: Basics of the Indian Constitution and civic responsibilities.

name: Engineering Mechanics
description: Statics and dynamics fundamentals for engineering structures.

name: Programming in C
description: Introduction to C programming, algorithms and basic data handling.

name: Workshop Practice
description: Hands-on workshop skills including basic fitting and carpentry.

name: Environmental Science
description: Fundamentals of environment, ecology, pollution, and conservation.

theory: Interactions between human populations and the environment; carrying capacity and resource pressures.
Trends, causes and consequences of population growth; demographic transition and population policies.
Linkages between human rights and environmental protection, access to resources and environmental justice.
Overview of family welfare initiatives, reproductive health services and their role in sustainable development.
How environmental factors affect human health; common environmental diseases and prevention strategies.
Basic facts about HIV/AIDS, transmission, prevention and the social-environmental implications.
Programs and policies for women's welfare and empowerment; gender perspectives in environmental planning.
Child health, nutrition and welfare programs; environmental determinants of child well-being.
Use of IT in environmental management, monitoring, awareness, and decision support systems.

name: Applied Chemistry
description: Basic chemistry concepts relevant to engineering applications.

name: Human Values and Professional Ethics
description: Ethical practice, professional responsibility and human values.
